PROP-baseauction-inv-008.text: Asset out tokens received via performUpkeep must be forwarded to assetOutReceiver, not auctioned.
PROP-baseauction-inv-008.assertion: forall performUpkeep: asset == assetOut => safeTransfer(asset, assetOutReceiver, balance)

locations.note: assetOut forwarding logic: when asset == assetOut, transfers balance to assetOutReceiver
